title: astragalus aleppicus subsp. oblongus
intro: Astragalus aleppicus subsp. oblongus, also known as the oblong astragalus, is a type of plant belonging to the pea family Fabaceae, native to the mountainous regions of the Middle East and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an adaptogen to enhance the body's ability to resist stress and disease. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immunomodulatory effects, which can help to boost the immune system and protect against infections. Astragalus aleppicus subsp. oblongus is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, to support overall health and well-being.
